hero.name: Iliyaz Ahmed
hero.description: Full-Stack-utvecklare specialiserad på moderna JavaScript-ekosystem, molnbaserad arkitektur på GCP och AI-drivna lösningar som ger verklig affärsnytta.

about.title: Get to know me
about.subtitle: About my background and experience
about.paragraph1: I'm a Full-Stack Developer with 7+ years of experience delivering scalable, production-grade web applications across the JavaScript and TypeScript ecosystem. My expertise spans React, Angular, Next.js, Node.js, and Express, with a strong focus on performance, scalability, and clean architecture.
about.paragraph2: I have a growing focus on AI-driven application development, integrating intelligent features such as automation, data insights, and smart user interactions using modern AI APIs and cloud services. I'm particularly interested in building systems that combine traditional web engineering with AI capabilities to create more adaptive and efficient user experiences.
about.paragraph3: I bring strong experience in GCP, SQL/NoSQL databases, and analytics integration, enabling me to design data-driven systems end-to-end. I ensure high-quality delivery through Cypress-based test automation, proactive monitoring with Sentry, and CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions.
about.paragraph4: I take ownership of frontend architecture, from crafting pixel-perfect interfaces to contributing actively to product decisions, and collaborate closely with cross-functional teams to align technical solutions with business goals.

contact.title: Kontakta mig
contact.subtitle: Låt oss arbeta tillsammans
contact.description: Jag är just nu öppen för nya möjligheter och intressanta projekt. Oavsett om du har en fråga, ett förslag eller bara vill säga hej är min inkorg alltid öppen.
